step_rationale: Immune activation and leukocyte recruitment marker; predicts adverse outcomes in acute coronary syndrome.
mechanism: suPAR amplifies leukocyte recruitment and vascular inflammation, exacerbating plaque destabilization and coronary thrombosis.
